text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... I can't believe this happened...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry for worrying you like this, Trainer... Sniffle.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
No... Snap out of it, Falco! An Umadol's tears are
reserved only for happy moments!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'll be fine, Trainer! So pick your head up and turn
that frown upside down!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ouchie!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ouchie!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Agh... I can't believe I made my very first fan look
so sad...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
An Umadol's job is to make her fans happy, right?
Okay! I'm gonna put all my effort into healing up!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Stay tuned for Falco's miraculous recovery arc! I'll
be celebrating my comeback with a concert!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon decides to rest and wait patiently
for her injuries to heal.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: I know you can do it!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Uh, Trainer, can we hold up a sec?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
My injury might be a lot more serious than I
thought... Maybe I shouldn't move around too
much? I dunno...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to force a smile for long, Smart Falcon
takes time off to get some much needed rest.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You're absolutely right! I'm not one to get down
over something like this!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for believing in me! Consider me back in
action!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Let's go! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to your encouragement, I've got tons of
energy!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All right! I just know I can get through it now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon resumes training and makes an
astonishing recovery!
